reviews.review_title: Well, Screwme for believing in humanity.
reviews.review_description: This game doesn’t even work. Not only did I JUST find out today that there was a limited trial run for this one back in 2024, But When you try to boot it up, it doesn’t even work to begin with! It just kicks you out!
The games so fun but the ratingsbsuck but they kick you out once you reach a certain point definitely needs mores story mode quest things

Its a good game but its matchmaking is a 
little confusing and why is single player even an option if it behind a pay wall

I wish I could enjoy this game and I paid for the single player mode, but I can’t get past the first level with the guards and there is literally no walk-through for it. Hence the low rating. Maybe if I can find a walk-through I’d give it a higher rating but as for now it’s a game I can’t play.  would be nice if you can add if you die like five times or something like that give the player the option to skip or like I said, write a walk-through.  the developer replied I can use my wand, but what wand? You don’t have a wand. Again just bs 
 to purchase their game. I agree. The footsteps are used to see where the guards are, but the guards can come from any side the footsteps are useless. And I don’t know what imaginary one the developers are talking about because there is no wand. just some bs so you buy their game.
No tutorial nothing doesn't even help new players. It's a very unstable game. Glad this was free I wouldn't pay a cent for this game not even a penny. Seems the devs don't care about this game.
AT first i couldnt join but the when i finally did after 30 min the game sucked when i said a spell it barely worked half the time
it was fun but i don't have enough money so i can't play

This game is so underrated, it’s not even funny. It needs more players. The magic is amazing, the voice activation works well as long as your voice is clear, and the game is overall a fun game. Although, I have some reasons on why it’s 4 stars and not 5. Devs, listen up.

1) Fix Beta tora eleves. The spell just doesn’t work. I say it correctly, but it says that I can’t use it. Same with everyone I’ve ever played with. Fix it ASAP. Calina already only has 3 spells, and the fact that one of them doesn’t even work is unacceptable. Speaking of Calina…

2) NERF CALINA, PLEASE. All Calina players just spam slashes and end up winning because staffs don’t do damage. Either make it so staffs can do melee damage, nerf her speed, or nerf her damage. It PMO.

3) Fix the multiplayer player lobbies. The lobby itself is fine, but once you go into a game, it glitches. Fix it, I can’t practice forever. Also, the options don’t work. I can’t choose the map, match type, or anything else.

4) …Idk, get more players, the game’s fun.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your detailed review and for playing our game!

We really appreciate your feedback - it helps us make the game better for everyone. 

Great news about the Beta Tora Eleves issue - we've already fixed this! The spell has been renamed to "Caldia Eightee Letooth" for better voice recognition. Please give it a try with the new name, and it should work much better now.

We're working on all the other issues you mentioned too! We've posted our upcoming update schedule in the "What's New" section in-game. Please check it out when you have a chance - you'll see we're addressing the balance adjustments and lobby options you mentioned.

About the multiplayer lobby glitches - we'd love to get more details to help fix this properly. Would you mind joining our Discord server and sharing more about what's happening? Your input would be incredibly helpful.

Thanks again for supporting our game. We're committed to making it even more fun, and players like you help us get there!

See you in the arena! 🎮✨

reviews.review_description: I personally think it would be cool if we could customize our characters appearance instead of having a premade one bc what if there are 3 guys in a server and both male characters are taken already and the 3rd guy doesn’t wanna be a girl yk
really cool game, it’s actually very original, and it was fun to learn all the abilities. All in all, I’d say it is worth a try if you’re looking for something new.
Hoping the tutorial gets some work, maybe just me but not intuitive fighting mechanics even when attempting tutorial.

reviews.review_title: Dream come true for Harry Potter fan!
reviews.review_description:
As a Harry Potter fan, this game was a dream come true for me. Was first exposed to this game from their free VR-chat version where you get a glimpse of what Akpala is all about. 

Of course then I had to try their voice recognition activated paid version which is so much fun, esp when playing with friends. Look forward to the single player mode, and I think they need to get more users to play as multiplayer is an absolute thriller

First impressions and gameplay: https://youtu.be/FAl0MiJND6c

Love the ability to use my own voice to make spells, and the results are more accurate than I expected. But what drew me in was actually the tutorial, that made me feel like I'm playing Zelda in VR and the AI characters was so adorable (seriously) 

That being said, the game lacks auto matchmaking, and I couldn't find someone to play with. We need at least AI to play against and auto-matchmaking in the background to kickstart the game in my opinion.

Still, the combat in practice mode felt good, so does the designs of the arenas with powerups and mana management which all should make 2vs2 combat a fun experience.

Considering it's still in App Lab version and there is a bit more work to be done, I can imagine it to be a great spellcasting game. I always preferred voice over motion gestures. I even use a windows app to enable similar idea with Hogwarts Legacy.

Overall, I recommend checking the gameplay trailer and my video and make a decision yourself and I'll be monitoring this game for future updates. Thank you.
